title: Ruiyang 24 Pairs Red And Black Worker Gloves Handling Safety Work Gloves General handling, Builders Construction, Engineering, Maintenance, Material Handling, Packing Warehouse (24 Pairs Red, L)
features: Rubber Coated Design】 - Non-slip grip with gardening tools in dry and wet conditions, these gardening gloves for women are designed in the rubber coated appearance to offer extra protection

【FIT & VERSATILE】 - Fit snugly excellent fingers control large sizes available to fit most men and women ideal for landscaping, gardening, logistic, warehousing, driving, farming, general maintenance, painting, weeding, varnishing, construction and mechanic work.
【Packaging inclued】 - You will get 24 pairs rubber coated gloves with length in approx 23 cm, sufficient quantity will satisfy your daily using requirements
【Practical Function】 - You can use them even in dry and wet weather, to offer you a safety work condition, and can be washed to reusable for a long time.
description: Safety work gloves are a type of protective gear used to protect hands from damage. This multi-pack is perfect for professionals such as auto mechanics, warehouse workers, movers, mechanics, cleaners, construction workers, gardeners, carpenters, and painters. Advantage The mechanic working glove is made of polyurethane and nitrile rubber, which is oil-resistant, wear-resistant, non-slip, breathable, and waterproof. It fits the hand well, provides a , and is easier to operate. Instruction: Insert your fingers into the glove's finger cots one by one until the glove completely covers your hand. NOTE: Please confirm the size before placing an order.
